message:
style(audit): modernize format strings to use inline variables

Update format! macro calls in render_audit_log_rich() to use Rust's
inline variable syntax (e.g., `format!("{old}")` instead of
`format!("{}", old)`). This follows modern Rust style guidelines
and improves code readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
